How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23

holdings.infoBox: GABF is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are SuRo Capital stock at 5.40%, Berkshire Hathaway at 5.31%, S&P Global at 5.15%, Cohen & Steers at 4.76%, and KKR & Co. at 4.70%.

overview.description: The Gabelli Financial Services Opportunities ETF (GABF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF of US-listed equities of financial services firms. GABF was launched on May 9, 2022 and is issued by GAMCO Investors.

data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Dec. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gabelli Funds, LLC (“Gabelli”) today announced that all its actively managed ETFs are now fully transparent. These Gabelli ETFs complement the firm'...
